description: Open a real Chrome window pointed at an enterprise login URL and let the user complete device-restricted MFA / SSO manually. Persists the cookie state to active/browser-session/enterprise-sync/ so subsequent pipelines (verify-session.json) can re-attach.

LOGIN_URL.description: Where to land. Override per-customer via mission inputs.

params.message: Browser opened with persisted profile. Complete the login (device passkey / SMS / SSO) in the visible window. Cookies and storage are saved to active/browser-session/enterprise-sync. Run verify-session.json afterward to confirm.
